'''ât-h-t''' ('''katahat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quicklime|quicklime]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-h-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quicklime|quicklime]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-h-t
|-
! Lemma
| katahat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitahat|thitahat]] || [[word:jitahat|jitahat]] || [[word:shitahat|shitahat]] || [[word:kitahat|kitahat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutahat|thuthutahat]] || [[word:jujutahat|jujutahat]] || [[word:shushutahat|shushutahat]] || [[word:kukutahat|kukutahat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutahat|thutahat]] || [[word:jutahat|jutahat]] || [[word:shutahat|shutahat]] || [[word:kutahat|kutahat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutahat|thutahat]] || [[word:jutahat|jutahat]] || [[word:shutahat|shutahat]] || [[word:kutahat|kutahat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetahat|thetahat]] || [[word:jetahat|jetahat]] || [[word:shetahat|shetahat]] || [[word:ketahat|ketahat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotahat|thothotahat]] || [[word:jojotahat|jojotahat]] || [[word:shoshotahat|shoshotahat]] || [[word:kokotahat|kokotahat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotahat|thotahat]] || [[word:jotahat|jotahat]] || [[word:shotahat|shotahat]] || [[word:kotahat|kotahat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotahat|thotahat]] || [[word:jotahat|jotahat]] || [[word:shotahat|shotahat]] || [[word:kotahat|kotahat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtahat|thĂŠtahat]] || [[word:jĂŠtahat|jĂŠtahat]] || [[word:shĂŠtahat|shĂŠtahat]] || [[word:kĂŠtahat|kĂŠtahat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatahat|thathatahat]] || [[word:jajatahat|jajatahat]] || [[word:shashatahat|shashatahat]] || [[word:kakatahat|kakatahat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatahat|thatahat]] || [[word:jatahat|jatahat]] || [[word:shatahat|shatahat]] || [[word:katahat|katahat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatahat|thatahat]] || [[word:jatahat|jatahat]] || [[word:shatahat|shatahat]] || [[word:katahat|katahat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatahat|shatahat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatahat|goshatahat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatahat|gokishatahat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatahatnĂŒ|shatahatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatahatnknĂŒ|goshatahatnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatahatnĂŒ|gokishatahatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatahatshĂ«|shatahatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatahatnkshĂ«|goshatahatnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatahatshĂ«|gokishatahatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatahatro|shatahatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatahatnkro|goshatahatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatahatro|gokishatahatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatahatmu|shatahatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatahatnkmu|goshatahatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatahatmu|gokishatahatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatahatsher|shatahatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatahatnksher|goshatahatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatahatsher|gokishatahatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatahatng|shatahatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatahatnkng|goshatahatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatahatng|gokishatahatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatahatya|shatahatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatahatnkya|goshatahatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatahatya|gokishatahatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatahatyam|shatahatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatahatnkyam|goshatahatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatahatyam|gokishatahatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatahatnĂŒshĂ«|shatahatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatahatnknĂŒshĂ«|goshatahatnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatahatnĂŒshĂ«|gokishatahatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatahatnĂŒro|shatahatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatahatnknĂŒro|goshatahatnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatahatnĂŒro|gokishatahatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatahatnĂŒmu|shatahatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatahatnknĂŒmu|goshatahatnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatahatnĂŒmu|gokishatahatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatahatshĂ«nĂŒ|shatahatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatahatnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshatahatnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatahatshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishatahatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatahatshĂ«ro|shatahatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatahatnkshĂ«ro|goshatahatnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatahatshĂ«ro|gokishatahatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatahatshĂ«mu|shatahatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatahatnkshĂ«mu|goshatahatnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatahatshĂ«mu|gokishatahatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatahatronĂŒ|shatahatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatahatnkronĂŒ|goshatahatnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatahatronĂŒ|gokishatahatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatahatroshĂ«|shatahatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatahatnkroshĂ«|goshatahatnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatahatroshĂ«|gokishatahatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatahatromu|shatahatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatahatnkromu|goshatahatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatahatromu|gokishatahatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatahatmunĂŒ|shatahatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatahatnkmunĂŒ|goshatahatnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatahatmunĂŒ|gokishatahatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatahatmushĂ«|shatahatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatahatnkmushĂ«|goshatahatnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatahatmushĂ«|gokishatahatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatahatmuro|shatahatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatahatnkmuro|goshatahatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatahatmuro|gokishatahatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
